description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Android Release that runs on push to release/* branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use a single ubuntu-18.04 job that checks out the repository, sets up a bash shell, downloads and installs the Android NDK, sets up JDK 1.8, builds the Android SDK by installing required packages, configuring git, and running the build script, and finally uploads the output as an artifact named AndroidSDK.
